name: kb-registry
description: Manage agent-maintained knowledge bases — persistent, scoped, searchable, git-backed.

registry_config_path.title: Registry config path
registry_config_path.description: Path to registry config file. Default: ~/.config/kb-registry/registry.json

default_kb_root.title: Default KB root
default_kb_root.description: Default parent directory for new KBs. Default: ~/knowledge

metrics_path.title: Metrics path
metrics_path.description: Path to JSONL metrics file. Default: ~/.local/state/kb-registry/events.jsonl
